blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Strong winds with gusts to 52 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

Tomorrow: heavy drizzle, highs of 47°F, gusts to 58 mph.
Monday: flurries, highs of 45°F, gusts to 47 mph.
Thursday: 1.5" of snow, highs of 43°F, gusts to 71 mph.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 41°F, gusts to 41 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: overcast, highs of 49°F, gusts to 72 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 24".
